title: Apple Stack Hardening: Security Essenials for macOS, iOS & AppleID - DeFi Security Summit 2025
description:
Speaker: Bruno Torossi, Security Researcher, Opsek
Pablito.eth, Founder, Opsek
This workshop teaches participants how to properly harden their Apple devices and accounts. We will cover secure configuration for macOS and iOS, best-practice settings for Apple ID, effective keychain and passkeys usage, network protections, physical security, and recovery workflows. Participans will get to follow a concrete checklist they can apply immediately to strengthen their personal and organizational security posture.

About DSS
Every year, DSS brings together top minds in blockchain, auditing, and security — from white-hat hackers and protocol developers to academic researchers and industry leaders. The goal? To tackle the most pressing issues in DeFi security head-on — from smart contract exploits and cross-chain vulnerabilities to governance threats and beyond.

https://defisecuritysummit.org/
